    Connect using Fleet Manager
    To connect to the instance using Fleet Manager Remote Desktop, the SSM Agent must be installed and running on the instance. For more information, see Working with SSM Agent 
    You can connect to your Windows instance using a remote desktop client of your choice, and by downloading and running the RDP shortcut file below:
    When prompted, connect to your instance using the following username and password:

    Create EC2 Instance Connect Endpoint

    vpc-087399ff33c48e177
    Subnet IDs
    Security group
    Security group requirements

    The endpoint security group and instance security group need the following rules to work.

    Endpoint - outbound rule

    • Protocol:
      TCP
    • Port:
      22
    • Destination:
      Instance security group or VPC IPv4 CIDR
      Learn more 

    Instance - inbound rule

    • Protocol:
      TCP
    • Port:
      22
    • Source:
      Endpoint security group or VPC IPv4 CIDR
      Learn more
